$schema: Acceptance Criteria for PR #2: Seed Anonymized Task Data

pr.title: feat: seed anonymized Guangfu disaster data

devServer.note: Dev server may already be running. Check before starting.

happyPaths.name: Map loads and centers on Guangfu
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3456
Wait for map tiles to load (Leaflet tile layer visible)
Verify map is centered approximately on lat 23.67, lng 121.43 (Guangfu, Hualien)
happyPaths.expected: Map renders with tile layer. Center is NOT in Tainan (23.00, 120.21) — it should be in Hualien/Guangfu area.
happyPaths.verification: Check the visible area includes 花蓮縣光復鄉. Tile layer is not blank.

happyPaths.name: Task markers render with clustering
steps: On the map view, observe marker clusters
Zoom in to see individual markers
Verify markers are round with emoji icons
happyPaths.expected: Multiple marker clusters visible. Individual markers show emoji (🪏🔧🚜💪👥🛵 etc.). Total data has 392 tasks.
happyPaths.verification: At least 3+ cluster bubbles or individual markers visible on initial load.

happyPaths.name: Click task marker opens TaskDetailCard
steps: Zoom into the map until individual (non-clustered) markers appear
Click on any round task marker
Observe the detail card that slides in from the right (desktop) or bottom (mobile)
happyPaths.expected: TaskDetailCard appears with: title, description, address (花蓮縣光復鄉...), reporter name, contact phone.
happyPaths.verification: Card is visible and contains Chinese text content.

happyPaths.name: Task detail shows obviously fake PII
steps: With a TaskDetailCard open (from SD-03), inspect the reporter name and contact fields
happyPaths.expected: Reporter name matches pattern: {surname}小{animal} (e.g. 王小虎, 陳小貓, 郭小鯨). Contact phone matches pattern: 0987-654-{abc} (alphabetic suffix like 0987-654-sdg). These are obviously fake — NOT real-looking names or phone numbers.
happyPaths.verification: Name contains '小' followed by an animal character (虎貓鯨兔熊鹿鷹狐龍馬蛙鶴). Phone starts with '0987-654-' followed by 3 letters.

happyPaths.name: Task detail shows 3 history entries
steps: With a TaskDetailCard open, click to expand full detail modal (if applicable)
Look for history/timeline section
happyPaths.expected: Exactly 3 history entries visible: (1) type 'system' — '案件提交並確認', (2) type 'comment' — contextual message, (3) type 'status' — status update message.
happyPaths.verification: 3 history items rendered. At least one contains '案件提交並確認'. At least one is a comment type (not system/status).

happyPaths.name: Board view shows 4 columns with tasks
steps: Find and click the view mode toggle to switch to board view
Observe the kanban-style board layout
happyPaths.expected: 4 columns visible: 已回報, 招募中, 進行中, 已完成. Each column has task cards with count badges. Distribution is roughly: reported ~100, recruiting ~83, in_progress ~64, done ~145.
happyPaths.verification: All 4 columns rendered. Each column shows a non-zero count badge. No column says '目前無任務'.

happyPaths.name: Search filters tasks
steps: Find the search input field
Type '水電' into the search bar
Observe the search results panel or filtered markers
happyPaths.expected: Tasks matching '水電' appear in results. These are utility-type tasks from the HR data.
happyPaths.verification: At least 5+ results appear. Results contain '水電' in title or description.

happyPaths.name: Board view task cards show correct data
steps: In board view, examine task cards in any column
Check that cards show: emoji icon, title, description snippet, address, urgency badge
happyPaths.expected: Task cards render with: type emoji (🪏🔧🚜 etc.), title with address and role name, description with 需求類型, address with MapPin icon, urgency badge (緊急/中等/一般).
happyPaths.verification: Cards are not blank. At least one card in each visible column has content.

happyPaths.name: Zone polygons visible when toggled
steps: On the map view, open the layer menu (layers icon, bottom-right)
Ensure '避難區域' toggle is ON
Look for colored polygon overlays on the map
happyPaths.expected: At least one colored polygon overlay visible on the map in the Guangfu area.
happyPaths.verification: Polygon layer renders without console errors.
